failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("a.flex.items-center").first

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_02

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "\[--btn-hover\:hsl(" while parsing css selector "button.relative.isolate.inline-flex.items-center.justify-center.rounded-full.border.text-base.focus\:outline.sm\:text-sm.border-\[--btn-border\].bg-\[--btn-bg\].text-\[--btn-text\].hover\:bg-\[--btn-hover\].focus\:outline-\[--btn-text\].\[--btn-bg\:transparent\].\[--btn-hover\:hsl(var(--bg-overlay-hover))\].\[--btn-text\:hsl(var(--primary))\].w-full". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? testcase.name: test_TC_Legal_01

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Terms of Service\")]")
